assertions.assertion: Response explains that SameSite=Strict prevents the cookie from being set during the OIDC callback redirect from IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: The response explains the cross-site nature of the OIDC callback.

assertions.assertion: Response recommends changing SameSiteMode.Strict to SameSiteMode.Lax for the authentication cookie
Response includes code setting options.Cookie.SameSite = SameSiteMode.Lax on the cookie handler
Response mentions setting Cookie.SecurePolicy to Always for HTTPS
